headline: CIBC Capital Markets CDRs Closes the Market
summary: Toronto, Ontario--(Newsfile Corp. - May 14, 2026) - Elliot Scherer, Managing Director and Head, Wealth Solutions Group, CIBC Capital Markets, and his team, joined Graham MacKenzie, Managing Director, Exchange Traded Products, Toronto Stock Exchange ("TSX") to close the market to celebrate the recent listing of 15 new Canadian Depositary Receipts (CDRs) on TSX:Amphenol CDR (CAD Hedged) - (TSX: APH)CoreWeave CDR (CAD Hedged) - (TSX: CRWV)D.R. Horton CDR (CAD Hedged) - (TSX: DHI)Freeport-McMoRan...

headline: Amphenol (APH) Ranks Among the Best Aggressive Growth Stocks to Buy
summary: Amphenol Corporation (NYSE:APH) is one of the 10 Best Aggressive Growth Stocks to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts. On May 1, Seaport Research increased its price target on Amphenol Corporation (NYSE:APH) from $210 to $215 and maintained its Buy rating on the stock. This update comes after the company reported strong Q1 2026 results. […]

headline: Amphenol (APH) Prices €1.1B Dual-Tranche Senior Notes Offering
summary: Amphenol Corporation (NYSE:APH) is one of the best NYSE stocks to buy according to Wall Street analysts. On May 5, Amphenol priced a dual-tranche offering of euro-denominated senior notes totaling €1.1 billion. The offering consists of €600 million in notes due 2029 with a 3.375% annual interest rate and €500 million in notes due 2034 […]

headline: Amphenol Corp. (NYSE:APH): A GARP Stock with Strong Growth and Reasonable Valuation
summary: Amphenol (APH) is a top growth-at-a-reasonable-price stock with a 9/10 growth rating, strong earnings, and a reasonable valuation. Its high profitability and solid financial health make it a compelling GARP investment.

headline: Amphenol Joins EBO Standards Push As AI Data Center Role Grows
summary: Amphenol (NYSE:APH) has joined other major connectivity suppliers in a new multi-source agreement for expanded beam optical connectivity used in AI infrastructure. The MSA targets common standards for high performance optical interconnects that support large scale AI data centers. This collaboration is intended to align the industry around interoperable EBO solutions for future AI and data center deployments. For investors tracking NYSE:APH, this development comes as the stock trades around...
